headline: Beat the Market Like Zacks: Vicor, NVIDIA, UnitedHealth in Focus
summary: VICR, NVDA and UNH lead gains as Zacks-backed picks outperform the broader market across multiple portfolios.

headline: Evercore ISI Group Maintains In-Line on Public Storage, Lowers Price Target to $306
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst Steve Sakwa   maintains Public Storage (NYSE:PSA) with a In-Line and lowers the price target from $309 to $306.
